hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f && [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && ./node_modules/.bin/biome format --write --files-ignore-unknown=true "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f && [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && ./node_modules/.bin/biome lint --files-ignore-unknown=true "$f" 2>&1 || true; }
